query.query:
kubernetes.event.involved_object.kind: Pod AND
kubernetes.event.involved_object.name: *restore* AND
(kubernetes.event.reason :"BackOff" OR kubernetes.event.reason :"Failed" )

kubernetes.event.involved_object.kind: Pod AND
kubernetes.event.involved_object.name: *backup* AND
(kubernetes.event.reason :"BackOff" OR kubernetes.event.reason :"Failed" )

attributes.name: Low on available disk space in data partition
Available disk space in root file system
